1.0.1.en: V3 support finetuning and workflow triggering bug fix

1.0.2.en: Added fault states and workflows and insights

1.0.6.en: More V3 tweaks due to different registers

1.0.7.en: Small mapping bug in charge state

1.0.8.en: Power negative inverted to match Homey standard

1.0.9.en: handle missing firmware register for V3 better

1.0.11.en: Removed deprecated set charge power workflow actions

1.0.12.en: flow formatting fixes and build in delay for mode switch

1.1.0.en: Improve connection management for timeouts and retry patterns

1.1.1.en: Added support for bypassmode and extra mode change token

1.1.2.en: Deprecated action card and updated social links

1.1.6.en: Fix on force soc control ui

1.1.7.en: Added ip and slave id config in add wizard

1.2.0.en: Added Homey target_power capability for standard energy management (requires Homey >=12.13.0)

1.3.2.en: modbus package and idle battery bug

1.3.3.en: Diagnostic ringbuffer for work-mode write/read latency, viewable in settings

1.3.4.en: Hot-path optimizations for sustained target_power writes from external orchestrators

1.3.5.en: Fix periodic drop to 0W during sustained charging by refreshing the firmware power-countdown (force-control keepalive)
